subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thou hast come beneath the shadow of divine protection as one who hath believed in God and is assured of His signs, and from the cup of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در ظل عصمت مومن بالله و موقن بایات الله در آمدی و از کاس عطا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer
